title: sticherus pallescens
intro: Sticherus pallescens, also known as the pale tree fern, is a type of evergreen tree fern native to New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sticherus pallescens include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
